@startuml
skinparam UMLClassDiagram labelStyle "Codelister"
skinparam UMLClassDiagram classStyle "Format"

class Codelister {
    label "Codelist"
    label "Format"
    label "C"
}

class Format {
    label "Ukjent format = av/0"
    label "Ren tekst = x-fmt/111"
    label "TIFF versjon 6 = fmt/353"
    label "PDF/A 1a - ISO 19005-1:2005 = fmt/95"
    label "PDF/A 1b - ISO 19005-1:2005 = fmt/354"
    label "XML = fmt/101"
    label "JPEG = fmt/42"
    label "SOSI = av/1"
    label "MPEG-2 = x-fmt/386"
    label "MP3 = fmt/134"
    label "PNG = fmt/11"
}

@enduml
